name: Kokis
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg.
2. Sieve the rice flour into a bowl and add the beaten egg, turmeric, salt, and enough coconut milk to form a thick batter.
3. Heat the oil in a deep pot or skillet until it is hot and begins to bubble.
4. Hold the kokis mold over the hot oil so that only the bottom of the mold gets submerged, ensuring it does not get completely covered with batter.
5. Carefully remove the mold from the oil and gently place it back into the hot oil where the batter will separate from the mold while still maintaining its shape as it deep fries.
6. If the batter adheres to the mold, use a wooden toothpick to carefully loosen it before repeating the process for any remaining batter.
7. Continue this process until all the batter has been used.
